mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, provider, provider_id AS providerId, COALESCE(role, 'USER') AS role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, provider, provider_id AS providerId, COALESCE(role, 'USER') AS role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users
login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
COALESCE(role, 'USER') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( login_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(role, 'USER') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND created_at >= #{startDate}
AND created_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
display_name = #{request.displayName},
role = #{request.role},
password_hash = #{request.password},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
